name: Neck Flexion
description: Move head away from pulley by bending neck forward until chin touches upper chest. Return head by hyperextending neck and repeat.

name: Neck Flexion
description: Move head forward by flexing neck until chin touches upper chest. Return head by hyperextending neck and repeat.

name: Lateral Neck Flexion
description: Move head down to side by laterally flexing neck. Return head to opposite side and repeat. Sit in machine backwards and continue with opposite side.

name: Neck Flexion
description: Move head forward by flexing neck until chin touches upper chest. Return head by hyperextending neck and repeat.

name: Lateral Neck Flexion
description: Move head down to side by laterally flexing neck. Return head to opposite side and repeat. Sit in machine backwards and continue with opposite side.

name: Neck Flexion
description: Move head up by flexing neck until chin touches upper chest. Return by hyperextending neck and repeat.

name: Lateral Neck Flexion
description: Move head up to side by laterally flexing neck. Lower head to opposite side and repeat. Lie on other side and continue.

name: Wall Front Neck Bridge
description: Roll down onto forehead until nose touches mat. Roll up onto top of head until chin touches upper chest. Repeat.

name: Wall Side Neck Bridge
description: Push side of head into mat and roll onto top of head moving body away from mat. Return to original position by rolling back down to side of head while bringing shoulder back over end of column or wall. Repeat.

name: Neck Flexion
description: Increase angle of body by bowing head until chin touches upper chest. Lower angle of body by raising head. Repeat.

name: Lateral Neck Flexion
description: Lower angle of body by tilting head to side of suspension trainer. Increase angle of body by tilting head away from side of suspension trainer. Repeat and continue in opposite position.

name: Neck Extension
description: Move head away from pulley by hyperextending neck. Return by bending neck forward until chin touches upper chest. Repeat.

name: Neck Extension
description: Move head back by hyperextending neck. Return by bending neck forward until chin touches upper chest. Repeat.

name: Neck Extension
description: Move head back by hyperextending neck. Return by bending neck forward until chin touches upper chest. Repeat.

name: Seated Neck Extension
description: Move head up by hyperextending neck up as high as possible. Return by bending neck down until chin touches upper chest. Repeat.

name: Seated Neck Extension:  Harness
description: Move head up by hyperextending neck. Return by bending neck down until chin touches upper chest. Repeat.

name: Neck Retraction
description: Move head up by hyperextending neck. Return by bending neck down until chin touches upper chest. Repeat.

name: Wall Rear Neck Bridge
description: Push head back into mat and roll head upward. Arch spine and straighten knees. Hyperextend neck so head is facing up. Return to original position by rolling head down while allowing low back to straighten and knees to bend slightly. Continue down until back of head and shoulders make contact with mat. Repeat.

name: Lying Neck Retraction
description: Push head into mat and hold position. Relax and repeat.

name: Neck Extension
description: Lower angle of body by bowing head until chin is near upper chest. Increase angle of body by raising head. Repeat.

name: Front Raise
description: Raise barbell forward and upward until upper arms are above horizontal. Lower and repeat.

name: Military Press
description: Press bar upward until arms are extended overhead. Lower to front of neck and repeat.

name: Military Press:  Seated
description: Press bar upward until arms are extended overhead. Return to upper chest and repeat.

name: Front Raise
description: Raise stirrups forward and upward until upper arms are well above horizontal. Lower and repeat.

name: Front Raise:  Alternating
description: Raise one stirrup forward and upward until upper arm is well above horizontal. Lower and repeat with opposite arm, alternating between arms.

name: Front Raise:  One Arm
description: Raise stirrup forward and upward until upper arm is well above horizontal. Lower and repeat. Repeat with opposite arm.

name: Shoulder Press
description: Push stirrups upward until arms are extended overhead. Return stirrups to sides of shoulders and repeat.

name: Shoulder Press:  Seated
description: Push stirrups upward until arms are extended overhead. Return stirrups to sides of shoulders and repeat.

name: Arnold Press
description: Initiate movement by bringing elbows out to sides. Continue to raise elbows outward while pressing dumbbells overhead until arms are straight. Lower to front of shoulders in opposite pattern and repeat.

name: Front Raise
description: Raise dumbbells forward and upward until upper arms are above horizontal. Lower and repeat.

name: Front Raise:  Alternating
description: Raise one dumbbell forward and upward with palms positioned downward until upper arm is above horizontal. Lower and repeat with opposite arm, alternating between arms.

name: Shoulder Press
description: Press dumbbells upward until arms are extended overhead. Lower to sides of shoulders and repeat.

name: Shoulder Press:  One Arm
description: Press dumbbell upward until arm is extended overhead. Lower to side of shoulder and repeat.

name: Military Press
description: Press lever until arms are extended upward. Lower and repeat.

name: Reclined Shoulder Press
description: Press lever until arms are extended. Lower and repeat.

name: Shoulder Press
description: Press lever upward until arms are extended overhead. Lower and repeat.

name: Reclined Shoulder Press
description: Press lever until arms are extended. Lower and repeat.

name: Shoulder Press
description: Press lever upward until arms are extended overhead. Lower and repeat.

name: Shoulder Press:  Parallel Grip
description: Press lever upward until arms are extended overhead. Lower and repeat.

name: Shoulder Press
description: Press handles upward until arms are extended overhead. Lower and repeat.

name: Shoulder Press
description: Press bar upward until arms are extended overhead. Lower bar to front of shoulders and repeat.

name: Pike Press (between benches)
description: Lower head between ends of benches by bending arms. Push body back up to original position by extending arms. Repeat.

name: Pike Press (between benches):  Elevated (between benches)
description: Lower head between ends of benches by bending arms. Push body back up to original position by extending arms. Repeat.

name: Front Raise
description: Raise arms upward overhead by flexing shoulders with arms straight. Return and lower body back until arms are extended straight forward in original position. Repeat.

name: Upright Row
description: Pull bar to neck with elbows leading. Allow wrists to flex as bar rises. Lower and repeat.

name: Lateral Raise
description: With elbows slightly bent, raise arms to sides   until elbows are shoulder height. Lower and repeat.

name: Lateral Raise:  One Arm
description: With elbow slightly bent, raise arm to side away from low pulley until elbow is shoulder height. Lower and repeat.

name: Upright Row
description: Pull bar to neck with elbows leading. Allow wrists to flex as bar rises. Lower and repeat.

name: Upright Row:  One Arm
description: Pull stirup to front side of shoulder with elbow leading. Allow wrist to flex as stirrup is lifted. Lower and repeat.

name: Upright Row:  with rope
description: Pull rope ends to front of shoulders with elbows leading. Allow wrists to flex as stirrups are lifted. Lower and repeat.

name: Y Raise
description: With elbows slightly bent, raise arms upward and outward to sides in Y configuration until elbows are approximately lateral to each ear. Lower stirrups forward and downward in reverse pattern. Repeat.

name: Incline Lateral Raise
description: With elbows slightly bent, raise arms upward and outward to sides in Y configuration until elbows are approximately lateral to each ear. Lower stirrups forward and downward in reverse pattern. Repeat.

name: Lateral Raise
description: Raise upper arms to sides until slightly bent elbows are shoulder height while maintaining elbows' height above or equal to wrists. Lower and repeat.

name: Upright Row
description: Pull dumbbells to front of shoulder with elbows leading out to sides. Allow wrists to flex as dumbbells rise upward. Lower and repeat.

name: Upright Row:  One Arm
description: Pull dumbbell to front of shoulder with elbow leading. Allow wrist to flex as dumbbell rises upward. Lower and repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Lateral Raise
description: Raise arms to sides until upper arms are horizontal. Return and repeat.

name: Lateral Raise
description: Raise arms to sides until upper arms are horizontal. Return and repeat.

name: Lateral Raise:  other machine
description: Raise arms to sides until upper arms are horizontal. Return and repeat.

name: Upright Row​​​​​​​
description: Pull bar to neck with elbows leading. Allow wrists to flex as bar rises. Lower and repeat.

name: Y Raise
description: Raise arms upward and outward in shape of a Y while keeping arms straight. Return and lower body back in opposite motion until arms are extended straight forward in original position. Repeat.

name: Rear Delt Row
description: Keeping upper arm perpendicular to torso, pull barbell up toward upper chest until upper arms are just beyond horizontal. Return and repeat.

name: Reverse Fly
description: Pull stirrups out to sides, maintaining stiff elbow position throughout exercise. Return to original position and repeat.

name: Rear Delt Row
description: Pull cable attachment toward upper chest, just below neck, with elbows up out to sides until elbows travel slightly behind back. Keep upper arms horizontal, perpendicular to trunk. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Rear Delt Row:  Standing Rear Delt Row (stirrups)
description: Pull stirrups out to sides, keeping elbows at shoulder height until elbows travel slightly behind back. Allow wrists to follow elbows. Keep upper arms horizontal, perpendicular to trunk. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Rear Lateral Raise
description: Raise upper arms to sides until elbows are shoulder height. Maintain upper arms perpendicular to torso and slight bend in elbows as arms are raised to sides. Lower and repeat.

name: Rear Lateral Raise
description: Raise upper arms to sides until elbows are shoulder height. Maintain upper arms perpendicular to torso and fixed elbow position (10° to 30° angle) throughout exercise. Maintain height of elbows above wrists by raising "pinkie finger" side up. Lower and repeat.

name: Rear Delt Row
description: Pull dumbbell up out to side with upper arm perpendicular to trunk until upper arm is just beyond horizontal. Lower and repeat.

name: Seated Rear Lateral Raise
description: Raise upper arms to sides until elbows are shoulder height. Maintain upper arms perpendicular to torso and fixed elbow position (10° to 30° angle) throughout exercise. Maintain elbows height above wrists by raising "pinkie finger" side up. Lower and repeat.

name: Lying Rear Lateral Raise
description: Pull arms up until elbows are beyond back. Return and repeat.

name: Seated Rear Delt Row
description: Pull lever with elbows up out to sides until upper arms are just beyond parallel, keeping upper arm horizontal, perpendicular to torso. Return and repeat.

name: Seated Rear Delt Row:  alternative machine
description: Pull lever with elbows up out to sides until upper arms are just beyond parallel, keeping upper arm horizontal, perpendicular to torso. Return and repeat.

name: Lying Rear Lateral Raise
description: Pull arms up until elbows are beyond back. Lower and repeat.

name: Seated Rear Delt Row
description: Pull lever with elbows up out to sides until upper arms are just beyond parallel, keeping upper arm horizontal, perpendicular to torso. Return and repeat.

name: Seated Reverse Fly
description: Keeping elbows pointed high, pull handles apart and to rear until elbows are just behind back. Return and repeat.

name: Seated Reverse Fly:  pronated grip
description: Keeping elbows pointed high, pull handles apart and to rear until elbows are just behind back. Return and repeat.

name: Rear Delt Row
description: Keeping upper arm perpendicular to torso, pull bar up toward upper chest until upper arms are just beyond parallel to floor. Return and repeat.

name: Rear Delt Inverted Row (high bar)
description: Lower body while keeping body straight, elbows high, and upper arms perpendicular to torso, until arms are extended straight. Pull shoulders toward bar while keeping elbows up high until upper arms are parallel to one another, or just beyond. Repeat.

name: Rear Delt Inverted Row (on hips)
description: Keeping hips on floor, low back straight, and elbow pointed out to sides; pull torso up to bar. Return when upper arms are just beyond parallel to one another. Lower body downward until arms are extended straight. Return and repeat.

name: Rear Delt Row
description: Pull body up while keeping elbows pointed directly out to each side and body and legs straight. Pull until elbows are directly lateral to each side without allowing elbows to drop. Return until arms are extended straight and shoulders are stretched forward, maintaining high elbow position. Repeat.

name: Reverse Fly
description: Pull handles out to sides while keeping stiff elbow position and maintaining shoulder at 90° plane to torso throughout exercise. Raise up until upper arms are in-line to one another. Return to original position in same plane and repeat.

name: Front Lateral Raise
description: With elbow straight or slightly bent, raise upper arm away from low pulley to side, slightly to front (30°) until upper arm is shoulder height. Lower and repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Front Lateral Raise
description: Raise arms to side, slightly to front until shoulder height or slightly higher. Lower and repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Full Can Lateral Raise
description: Raise arms to side with thumb side up. Lower and repeat.

name: Lying Lateral Raise
description: Raise dumbbell from floor until arm is vertical. Maintain fixed elbow position (10° to 30° angle) throughout exercise. Lower and repeat.

name: Triceps Dip
description: Lower body until slight stretch is felt in shoulders. Push body up until arms are straight. Repeat.

name: Triceps Dip:  kneeling
description: Lower body until slight stretch is felt in shoulders. Push body up until arms are straight. Repeat.

name: Close Grip Bench Press
description: Lower weight to chest with elbows close to body. Push barbell back up until arms are straight. Repeat.

name: Lying Triceps Extension
description: Lower bar by bending elbows. As bar nears head, move elbows slightly back just enough to allow bar to clear around curvature of head. Extend arms. As bar clears head, reposition elbows to their former position until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Lying Triceps Extension:  Skull Crusher
description: Lower bar to forehead by bending elbows. Extend arms and repeat.

name: Triceps Extension
description: Lower barbell behind upper shoulders by flexing elbows allowing forearms to travel behind upper arms with elbows remaining overhead. Raise barbell overhead by extending elbows until arms are positioned straight and vertical. Lower and repeat.

name: Bent-over Triceps Extension
description: Lower barbell behind upper shoulders by flexing elbows allowing forearms to travel behind upper arms with elbows remaining overhead. Raise barbell overhead by extending elbows until arms are positioned straight and vertical. Lower and repeat.

name: Pushdown
description: Extend arms down. Return until forearm is close to upper arm. Repeat.

name: Pushdown:  One Arm
description: Extend arm down. Return until forearm is close to upper arm. Repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Pushdown:  with back support
description: Extend arms down. Return until forearm is close to upper arm. Repeat.

name: Pushdown:  with V-bar attachment
description: Extend arms down. Return until forearm is close to upper arm. Repeat.

name: Triceps Dip
description: Lower body by bending arms until slight stretch is felt in shoulders. Push body up until arms are straight. Repeat.

name: Triceps Extension
description: Raise cable bar overhead by extending elbows until arms are positioned straight and vertical. Lower cable bar behind neck by flexing elbows allowing forearms to travel behind upper arms with elbows remaining overhead. Repeat.

name: Triceps Extension:  with rope
description: Raise ends of rope overhead by extending forearms until arms are straight. Lower rope attachment until forearms are against upper arms. Repeat.

name: Kickback
description: Extend arm until it is straight. Return and repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Lying Triceps Extension
description: Lower dumbbells by bending elbow until they are to sides of head. Extend arm. Repeat.

name: One Arm Triceps Extension (on bench)
description: Extend arm until straight while maintaining upper arm's vertical position throughout exercise. Return until dumbbell is behind neck or shoulder and repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Triceps Extension
description: With elbows over head, lower forearm behind upper arm by flexing elbows. Flex wrists at bottom to avoid hitting dumbbell on back of neck. Raise dumbbell over head by extending elbows while hyperextending wrists. Return and repeat.

name: Close Grip Bench Press
description: With elbows over head, lower forearm behind upper arm by flexing elbows. Flex wrists at bottom to avoid hitting dumbbell on back of neck. Raise dumbbell over head by extending elbows while hyperextending wrists. Return and repeat.

name: Triceps Extension
description: Push lever down until arms are fully extended. Return and repeat.

name: Triceps Dip
description: Push levers down with elbows pointing back. Allow lever bar to raise until shoulders are slightly stretched. Repeat.

name: Triceps Dip
description: Push levers down by straightening arms downward. Allow lever bar to raise with elbows pointing back until shoulders are slightly stretched. Repeat.

name: Triceps Dip:  alternative machine
description: Push levers down by straightening arms downward. Allow lever bar to raise with elbows pointing back until shoulders are slightly stretched. Repeat.

name: Triceps Extension
description: Push lever down until arms are fully extended. Return until forearms contact upper arms. Repeat.

name: Triceps Extension:  with preacher pad New!
description: Push lever down until arms are fully extended. Return until forearms contact upper arms. Repeat.

name: Standing Triceps Dip
description: Push lever down until arms are fully extended. Return until forearms contact upper arms. Repeat.

name: Close Grip Bench Press
description: Lower weight to chest with elbows close to body. Push bar back up until arms are straight. Repeat.

name: Bench Dip
description: Lower body by bending arms until slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulder, or rear end touches floor. Raise body and repeat.

name: Triceps Dip
description: Lower body until slight stretch is felt in shoulders. Push body up until arms are straight. Repeat.

name: Triceps Dip
description: Lower body until slight stretch is felt in shoulders. Push body up until arms are straight. Repeat.

name: Bench Dip
description: Lower body by bending arms until slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulder, or rear end touches floor. Raise body and repeat.

name: Bench Dip:  heel on floor
description: Lower body by bending arms until slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulder, or rear end touches floor. Raise your body and repeat.

name: Close Grip Push-up
description: Keeping body straight, lower body to floor by bending arms. Push body up until arms are extended. Repeat.

name: Close Grip Push-up:  on knees
description: Keeping body straight, lower body to floor by bending arms. Push body up until arms are extended. Repeat.

name: Close Grip Push-up:  Incline on bar
description: Keeping body straight, lower chest to bar by bending arms. Push body up until arms are extended. Repeat.

name: Triceps Dip
description: Lower body until slight stretch is felt in shoulders. Push body up until arms are straight. Repeat.

name: Triceps Extension
description: Lower body by bending elbows, allowing head to travel between suspension handles. Raise body up and back up until arms are extended. Repeat.

name: Triceps Dip
description: Lower body by bending arms back. If necessary, use minimal assistance of lower body to control descent, allowing knees to bend, keeping toes in contact with bench or elevation. When slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulders push body up until arms are straight. Repeat with minimal assistance from legs.

name: Curl
description: With elbows to side, raise bar until forearms are vertical. Lower until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Alternating Curl
description: Pull one stirrup up forward and upward toward shoulder while keeping elbow stationary. Return until arm is fully extended. Repeat on other arm, alternating between sides.

name: Curl
description: With elbows to side, raise bar until forearms are vertical. Lower until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Curl:  with stirrups
description: Pull stirrups forward and upward toward shoulders while keeping elbows stationary. Return until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Curl:  One Arm Curl
description: With elbow to side, raise bar until forearms are vertical. Lower until arms are fully extended. Repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Curl
description: With elbows to sides, raise one dumbbell and rotate forearm until forearm is vertical and palm faces shoulder. Lower to original position and repeat with opposite arm. Continue to alternate between sides.

name: Incline Curl
description: With elbows back to sides, raise one dumbbell and rotate forearm until forearm is vertical and palm faces shoulder. Lower to original position and repeat with opposite arm. Continue to alternate between sides.

name: Curl
description: Raise lever handles until elbows are fully flexed with back of upper arm remaining on pad. Lower handles until arm is fully extended. Repeat.

name: Inverted Biceps Row
description: Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Preacher Curl
description: Raise bar until forearms are vertical. Lower barbell until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Prone Incline Curl
description: Raise bar until arms are flexed. Lower barbell until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Concentration Curl
description: Pull stirrup to front of shoulder until elbow is completely flexed. Lower stirrup until arm is fully extended. Repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Preacher Curl
description: Raise cable bar toward shoulders. Lower cable bar until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Preacher Curl: Stirrups
description: Raise both stirrups upward toward shoulders. Lower stirrups until arm is fully extended. Repeat.

name: Concentration Curl
description: Raise dumbbell to front of shoulder. Lower dumbbell until arm is fully extended. Repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Preacher Curl
description: Lower dumbbell until arm is fully extended. Raise dumbbell until forearm is vertical. Repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Preacher Curl
description: Raise lever handles toward shoulders. Lower handles until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Preacher Curl: arms high
description: Pull lever handles toward shoulders. Return handles until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Preacher Curl
description: Raise lever handles toward shoulders. Lower handles until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Preacher Curl: arms high
description: Pull lever handles toward shoulders. Return handles until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Arm Curl
description: Keeping body straight, bring handles toward top of shoulders by flexing arms, while keeping elbows pointed forward. Return by straightening arms and repeat.

name: Reverse Curl
description: With elbows to side, raise bar until forearms are vertical. Lower until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Hammer Curl
description: With elbows to side, raise rope forward and upward with both arms until forearms are vertical. Lower until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Reverse Curl
description: With elbows to side, raise bar until forearms are vertical. Lower until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Hammer Curl
description: With elbows to sides, raise one dumbbell until forearm is vertical and thumb faces shoulder. Lower to original position and repeat with alternative arm.

name: Reverse Curl​​​​​​​
description: Raise lever handles until elbows are fully flexed with back of upper arm remaining on pad. Lower handles until arm is fully extended. Repeat.

name: Wrist Curl
description: Allow barbell to roll out of palms down to fingers. Raise barbell back up by gripping and pointing knuckles up as high as possible. Lower and repeat.

name: Wrist Curl
description: Allow cable bar to roll out of palms down to fingers. Raise cable bar back up by gripping and pointing knuckles up as high as possible. Lower and repeat.

name: Wrist Curl
description: Allow dumbbell to roll out of palm down to fingers. Raise dumbbell back up by gripping and pointing knuckles up as high as possible. Lower and repeat.

name: Grip
description: Squeeze bars together with both hands until lower lever makes contact with upper bars. Lower to original position and repeat.

name: Wrist Curl
description: Raise bar up until wrist is fully flexed. Lower and repeat.

name: Grip
description: Squeeze bars together with both hands until lever makes contact with stationary bars. Lower to original position and repeat.

name: Wrist Curl
description: Raise handles up until wrist is fully flexed. Lower handles until wrists are full hyperextended. Repeat.

name: One Hand Grip
description: Raise handles up until wrist is fully flexed. Lower handles until wrists are full hyperextended. Repeat.

name: One Hand​​​​​​​
description: Squeeze bar grips together until lower bar makes contact with upper bar. Release to original position and repeat.

name: Reverse Wrist Curl
description: Raise barbell by pointing knuckles upward as high as possible. Return until knuckles are pointing downward as far as possible. Repeat.

name: Reverse Wrist Curl
description: Raise stirrup by pointing knuckles upward as high as possible. Return until knuckles are pointing downward as far as possible. Repeat.

name: Reverse Wrist Curl
description: Raise dummbell by pointing knuckles upward as high as possible. Return until knuckles are pointing downward as far as possible. Repeat.

name: Reverse Wrist Curl
description: Raise bar until wrist is fully hyperextended and return until wrist is fully flexed. Repeat.

name: Reverse Wrist Curl
description: Raise handles until wrist is fully hyperextended. Lower handles until wrists are fully flexed. Repeat.

name: Seated Pronation
description: Rotate dumbbell so thumb turns downward (pronation). Return and repeat.

name: Seated Pronation
description: Rotate shafts by turning palm downward. Return and repeat.

name: Seated Supination
description: Rotate dumbbell so thumb turns upward (supination). Return and repeat.

name: Seated Supination
description: Rotate shafts by turning palm upward. Return and repeat.

name: Bent-over Row
description: Pull bar to upper waist. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.

name: Bent-over Row:  Underhand
description: Pull bar to waist. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.

name: One Arm Bent-over Row
description: Pull cable attachment to side of torso, pulling shoulder back. Return until arm is extended and shoulder is stretched forward. Repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: One Arm Straight Back Seated High Row
description: Pull cable attachment to side of torso while pulling shoulder back, arching spine, and pushing chest forward. Return until arm is extended and shoulder is pulled forward. Repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Seated Row
description: Pull cable attachment to waist while straightening lower back. Pull shoulders back and push chest forward while arching back. Return until arms are extended, shoulders are stretched forward, and lower back is flexed forward. Repeat.

name: Seated Row:  Straight Back
description: Pull cable attachment to waist. Pull shoulders back and lift chest by arching back. Return until arms are extended, back is straight, and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Seated Wide Grip Row
description: Pull cable attachment to waist while pulling torso upright.   Pull shoulders back and push chest forward while arching back. Return until arms are extended, shoulders are stretched forward, and lower back is flexed forward. Repeat.

name: Seated Wide Grip Row:  Straight Back
description: Pull cable attachment to waist. Pull shoulders back and lift chest by arching back. Return until arms are extended, back is straight, and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Bent-over Row
description: Pull dumbbell to up to side until it makes contact with ribs or until upper arm is just beyond horizontal. Return until arm is extended and shoulder is stretched downward. Repeat and continue with opposite arm.

name: Lying Row
description: Pull dumbbells to sides until upper arm is just beyond horizontal or height of back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.

name: Incline Row
description: Pull lever up as high as possible. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.

name: Incline Row:  Close Grip
description: Pull lever up as high as possible. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched downward. Repeat.

name: Seated Rows
description: Pull levers back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Seated Rows:  Narrow Grip
description: Pull levers back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name:
Seated Rows:  Wide Grip

Low Bar
description: Pull levers back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Seated Rows (Others)
description: Pull levers back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Seated Rows (Others):  Seated Low Row
description: Pull levers back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Seated Rows (Others):  Seated High Row
description: Pull lever back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: T-bar Row
description: Pull lever back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: T-bar Row:  Close grip
description: Pull lever back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Seated Row
description: Pull lever back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Seated Row:  Wide Grip
description: Pull lever back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Seated Row (no chest pad)
description: Pull handles to waist while straightening torso upright. Pull shoulders back and push chest forward while arching back. Return until arms are extended, shoulders are stretched forward, and lower back is flexed forward. Repeat.

name: Seated Row (no chest pad):  Straight Back
description: Pull handles to waist while straightening torso upright. Pull shoulders back and push chest forward while arching back. Return until arms are extended, shoulders are stretched forward, and lower back is flexed forward. Repeat.

name: Underhand Seated Row
description: Pull levers back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Bent-over Row
description: Pull levers back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Inverted Row
description: Pull levers back until elbows are behind back and shoulders are pulled back. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Inverted Row
description: Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Inverted Row:  Feet Elevated
description: Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Inverted Row:  High Bar
description: Keeping body straight, pull body up to bar. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Inverted Row:  On Hips
description: Keeping hips on floor and low back straight, pull torso up to bar. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Inverted Row
description: Pull body up so sides of chest make contact with handles while keeping body straight. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended straight and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Inverted Row:  One Arm
description: Pull body up so sides of chest make contact with handles while keeping body straight. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended straight and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Row
description: Pull body up so sides of chest make contact with handles while keeping body and legs straight. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended straight and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Row:  One Arm
description: Pull body up so sides of chest make contact with handles while keeping body and legs straight. Pull shoulders back at top of movement with chest high. Return until arms are extended straight and shoulders are stretched forward. Repeat.

name: Pull-up (open-centered bar)
description: Pull body up until neck reaches height of hands. Lower body until arms and shoulders are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Pull-up
description: Lower body under bar until arms and shoulders are fully extended. If necessary, use minimal assistance of lower body to control descent, allowing knees and hips to bend, keeping flat on floor. Pull body up until chin is just above bar, again with minimal assistance from legs. Repeat.

If necessary, use minimal assistance of lower body to control descent, allowing knees and hips to bend, keeping flat on floor. Pull body up until chin is just above handles, again with minimal assistance from legs. Repeat.

name: Seated Shoulder External Rotation
description: Pull cable attachment away from body as far as possible by externally rotating shoulder. Return and repeat. Turn around and continue with opposite arm.

name: Seated Shoulder External Rotation:  Standing
description: Pull cable attachment away from body as far as possible by externally rotating shoulder. Return and repeat. Turn around and continue with opposite arm.

name: Lying Shoulder External Rotation
description: Lift dumbbell by rotating shoulder. Return and repeat. Flip over and continue with opposite arm.

name: Upright Shoulder External Rotation (with support)
description: Lower dumbbell forward by rotating shoulder. Return and repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Shoulder External Rotation
description: Lower dumbbell forward by rotating shoulder. Return and repeat. Continue with opposite arm.

name: Shoulder External Rotation
description: Pull lever away from body. Return and repeat. Adjust lever to opposite side and repeat with other arm.

name: Shoulder External Rotation
description: Pull handles apart from each side, while keeping fixed elbow position and body and legs straight throughout movement. Raise forward so handles are to each side of body. Return back until handles come back together in front of body. Repeat.

name: Standing Shoulder Internal Rotation
description: Pull handles apart from each side, while keeping fixed elbow position and body and legs straight throughout movement. Raise forward so handles are to each side of body. Return back until handles come back together in front of body. Repeat.

name: Shoulder Internal Rotation
description: Pull handles apart from each side, while keeping fixed elbow position and body and legs straight throughout movement. Raise forward so handles are to each side of body. Return back until handles come back together in front of body. Repeat.

name: Shoulder Internal Rotation:  on floor
description: Pull handles apart from each side, while keeping fixed elbow position and body and legs straight throughout movement. Raise forward so handles are to each side of body. Return back until handles come back together in front of body. Repeat.

name: Shoulder Internal Rotation
description: Pull handles apart from each side, while keeping fixed elbow position and body and legs straight throughout movement. Raise forward so handles are to each side of body. Return back until handles come back together in front of body. Repeat.

name: Shoulder Internal Rotation​​​​​​​
description: Pull handles apart from each side, while keeping fixed elbow position and body and legs straight throughout movement. Raise forward so handles are to each side of body. Return back until handles come back together in front of body. Repeat.

name: Chest Dip
description: Lower body by bending arms, allowing elbows to flare out to sides. When slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulders, push body up until arms are straight. Repeat.

name: Chest Dip:  kneeling
description: Lower body by bending arms, allowing elbows to flare out to sides. When slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulders push body up until arms are straight. Repeat.

name: Bench Press

name: Bench Press:  Power Lift

name: Decline Bench Press

name: Flies

name: Flies:  Lying Fly
description: Bring cable attachments together in hugging motion with elbows in fixed position and shoulders internally rotated so elbows are to sides. Return to starting position until slight stretch. Repeat.

name: Flies:  Seated Fly
description: Keeping elbows pointed high, bring cable attachments together in hugging motion with elbows in fixed position. Return to starting position until slight stretch. Repeat.

name: Flies:  Standing Fly
description: Bring cable attachments together in hugging motion with elbows in fixed position. Keep shoulders internally rotated so elbows are pointed upward at top and out to sides at bottom. Return to starting position until chest muscles are stretched. Repeat.

name: Presses
description: Push stirrups up over each shoulder until arms are straight and parallel to one another. Return stirrups to original position, until slight stretch is felt in shoulders or chest. Repeat.

name: Presses:  Bench Press

name: Bench Press

name: Flies:  Lying Fly

name: Flies:  Pec Deck Fly
description: Push levers together. Return until chest muscles are stretched. Repeat.

name: Chest Dip
description: Lower body by bending arms, allowing elbows to flare out to sides. If necessary, use minimal assistance of lower body to control descent, allowing knees and hips to bend, keeping forefeet in contact with bench or elevation. When slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulders, push body up until arms are straight and repeat, again with minimal assistance from legs.

name: Chest Dip
description: Push body up until arms are straight. Lower body until slight stretch is felt in shoulders.

name: Chest Press
description: Lower body by bending arms while keeping body straight. Allow handles to come apart slightly to keep in-line with elbows flaring out. Stop descent once mild stretch is felt through shoulders or chest. Push body up to original position, allowing handles to travel inward to keep in line with elbows converging until arms are fully extended. Repeat.

name: Fly
description: Lower body by allowing suspension handles to separate outward until mild stretch is felt in chest. Reverse motion by bringing handles back together in hugging motion. Repeat.

name: Clap Push-up
description: Lower body to floor and immediately push body up as fast as possible. As the hands leave ground, rapidly clap hands together and place back to original position, catching body before it falls. Repeat.

name: Depth Push-up
description: Lower body to floor and immediately push body up as fast as possible. As hands leave ground, rapidly place hands on platforms to sides, catching body before it falls. Lower body again. As soon as slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulders, immediately push upper body upward. Before upper body falls, immediately remove hands off of platforms and catch body by returning hands back on floor between platforms and repeat.

name: Incline Bench Press
description: Lower weight to upper chest. Press bar until arms are extended. Repeat.

name: Incline Bench Press
description: Push stirrups up over each shoulder until arms are straight and parallel to one another. Return stirrups to original position, until slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulders. Repeat.

name: Incline Chest Press
description: Push stirrups away from body, slightly upward at 30º to 45º until arms are straight and parallel to one another. Return stirrups to original position until slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulders. Repeat.

name: Incline Fly
description: Lower stirrups outward to sides of shoulders. Keep elbows fixed in slightly bent position. When a stretch is felt in chest or shoulders, bring stirrups back together in hugging motion above upper chest until stirrups are nearly together Repeat.

name: Incline Bench Press
description: Press dumbbells up with elbows to sides until arms are extended. Lower weight to sides of upper chest until slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulder. Repeat.

name: Incline Fly
description: Lower dumbbells outward to sides of shoulders. Keep elbows fixed in slightly bent position. When a stretch is felt in chest or shoulders, bring dumbbells back together in hugging motion above upper chest until dumbbells are nearly together. Repeat.

name: Incline Chest Press
description: Press lever until arms are extended. Return weight until chest muscles are slightly stretched. Repeat.

name: Incline Chest Press:  on Military Press Machine

name: Incline Bench Press
description: Press bar until arms are extended. Lower weight to upper chest. Repeat.

name: Incline Chest Press​​​​​​​
description: Press lever until arms are extended. Return weight until shoulders or chest feels slightly stretched. Repeat.

name: Incline Fly
description: Raise lever upward and together in hugging motion. Lower weight until slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulder. Repeat.

name: Incline Bench Press
description: Lower weight to upper chest. Press bar until arms are extended. Repeat.

name: Decline Push-up
description: Keeping body straight, lower upper body to floor by bending arms. To allow for full descent, pull head back slightly without arching back. Push body up until arms are extended. Repeat.

name: Decline Push-up:  on stability ball
description: Keeping hips straight, lower upper body to floor by bending arms. To allow for full descent, pull head back slightly without arching back. Push body up until arms are extended. Repeat.

name: Chest Dip
description: Lower body by bending arms, allowing elbows to flare out to sides. When slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulders, push body up until arms are straight. Repeat.

name: Standing Fly
description: Bring cable attachments together in hugging motion with elbows in fixed position. Keep shoulders internally rotated so elbows are pointed upward at top and out to sides at bottom. Return to starting position until chest muscles are stretched. Repeat.

name: Chest Dip
description: Push lever down by straightening arms. Return lever up with elbows flaring out until chest is slightly stretched. Repeat.

name: Chest Dip
description: Lower body by bending arms, allowing elbows to flare out to sides. When slight stretch is felt in chest or shoulders, push body up until arms are straight. Repeat.

name: Incline Shoulder Raise
description: Raise shoulders toward bar as high as possible. Lower shoulders to bench and repeat.

name: Incline Shoulder Raise
description: Raise shoulders toward stirrups as high as possible. Lower shoulders down and back and repeat.

name: Incline Shoulder Raise
description: Raise shoulders toward dumbbells as high as possible. Lower shoulders to bench and repeat.

name: Incline Shoulder Raise
description: Raise shoulders toward lever grips as far as possible. Lower shoulders to bench and repeat.

name: Incline Shoulder Raise
description: Raise shoulders toward lever grips as far as possible. Lower shoulders to bench and repeat.

name: Incline Shoulder Raise
description: Raise shoulders toward bar as high as possible. Lower shoulders to bench and repeat.

name: Push-up Plus
description: Raise shoulders toward bar as high as possible. Lower shoulders to bench and repeat.

name: Bent Knee Good-morning
description: Keeping back straight, bend hips to lower torso forward until parallel to floor. Bend knees slightly during descent. Raise torso until hips are extended. Repeat.

name: Deadlifts
description: Lift bar by extending hips and knees to full extension. Pull shoulders back at top of lift if rounded. Return weights to floor by bending hips back while allowing knees to bend forward, keeping back straight and knees pointed same direction as feet. Repeat.

name:
Deadlifts:  Stiff-leg Deadlift

Straight-back
description: With knees bent, lift bar by extending at hips until standing upright. Pull shoulders back at top of lift if rounded. Extend knees at top if desired. Lower bar to top of feet by bending hips. Bend knees slightly during descent and keep waist straight, flexing only slightly at bottom. Repeat.

name: Hip Thrust
description: With knees bent, lift bar by extending at hips until standing upright. Pull shoulders back at top of lift if rounded. Extend knees at top if desired. Lower bar to top of feet by bending hips. Bend knees slightly during descent and keep waist straight, flexing only slightly at bottom. Repeat.

name: Lunge
description: Lunge forward with first leg. Land on heel, then forefoot. Lower body by flexing knee and hip of front leg until knee of rear leg is almost in contact with floor. Return to original standing position by forcibly extending hip and knee of forward leg. Repeat by alternating lunge with opposite leg.

name: Lunge:  Rear Lunge
description: Step back with one leg while bending supporting leg. Plant forefoot far back on floor. Lower body by flexing knee and hip of supporting leg until knee of rear leg is almost in contact with floor. Return to original standing position by extending hip and knee of forward supporting leg and return rear leg next to supporting leg. Repeat movement with opposite legs alternating between sides.

name: Single Leg Split Squat
description: Squat down by flexing knee and hip of front leg until knee of rear leg is almost in contact with floor. Return to original standing position by extending hip and knee of forward leg. Repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Single Leg Split Squat:  Single Leg Squat
description: Squat down as far as possible while keeping leg elevated off of floor. Keep   supporting knee pointed same direction as foot supporting. Raise body back up to original position until knee and hip of supporting leg is straight. Return and repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Single Leg Split Squat:  Split Squat
description: Squat down by flexing knee and hip of front leg. Allow heel of rear foot to rise up while knee of rear leg bends slightly until it almost makes contact with floor. Return to original standing position by extending hip and knee of forward leg. Repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Squat
description: Squat down by flexing knee and hip of front leg. Allow heel of rear foot to rise up while knee of rear leg bends slightly until it almost makes contact with floor. Return to original standing position by extending hip and knee of forward leg. Repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Squat:  Front Squat
description: Squat down by bending hips back while allowing knees to bend forward, keeping back straight and knees pointed same direction as feet. Descend until thighs are just past parallel. Extend knees and hips until legs are straight. Return and repeat.

name: Squat:  Full Squat
description: Squat down by bending hips back while allowing knees to bend forward, keeping back straight and knees pointed same direction as feet. Descend until knees and hips are fully bent. Extend knees and hips until legs are straight. Return and repeat.

name: Squat:  Safety Squat
description: Squat down by bending hips back while allowing knees to bend slightly forward, keeping back straight and knees pointed same direction as feet. Descend until thighs are just past parallel to floor. Stand by extending hips and knees until legs are straight. Repeat.

name: Step-up
description: Place foot of first leg on bench. Stand on bench by extending hip and knee of first leg and place foot of second leg on bench. Step down with second leg by flexing hip and knee of first leg. Return to original standing position by placing foot of first leg to floor. Repeat first step with opposite leg alternating first steps between legs.

name: Glute Kickback
description: Place foot of first leg on bench. Stand on bench by extending hip and knee of first leg and place foot of second leg on bench. Step down with second leg by flexing hip and knee of first leg. Return to original standing position by placing foot of first leg to floor. Repeat first step with opposite leg alternating first steps between legs.

name: Rear Lunge
description: Step back with one leg while bending supporting leg. Plant forefoot far back on floor. Lower body by flexing knee and hip of supporting leg until knee of rear leg is almost in contact with floor. Return to original standing position by extending hip and knee of forward supporting leg and return rear leg next to supporting leg. Repeat movement with opposite legs alternating between sides.

name: Split Squat
description: Squat down by flexing knee and hip of front leg. Allow heel of rear foot to rise up while knee of rear leg bends slightly until it almost makes contact with floor. Return to original straddle position by extending hip and knee of forward leg. Repeat. Continue with legs in opposite position.

name: Split Squat:  Two Arms
description: Squat down by flexing knee and hip of front leg. Allow heel of rear foot to rise up while knee of rear leg bends slightly until it almost makes contact with floor. Return to original straddle position by extending hip and knee of forward leg. Repeat. Continue with legs in opposite position.

name: Squat
description: Keeping chest high and back straight, raise stirrups by extending knees and hips until legs are straight. Squat down by bending hips back while allowing knees to bend forward slightly, keeping back straight and knees pointed same direction as feet. Squat down until thighs are just past parallel to floor. Return and repeat.

name: Standing Hip Extension
description: Pull cable attachment back by extending hip. Return leg to original position. Repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Standing Hip Extension:  Bent-over
description: Pull cable attachment back by extending hip. Return leg to original position and repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Step-up
description: Place foot of first leg on elevated platform. Stand on elevated platform by extending hip and knee of first leg and place foot of second leg on bench. Step down with second leg by flexing hip and knee of first leg. Return to original standing position by placing foot of first leg to lower position. Repeat first step with opposite leg alternating first steps between legs.

name: Stiff-leg Deadlift
description: Bow forward by bending hips. Bend knees slightly during descent and keep waist straight, flexing low back at bottom. With knees slightly bent, raise torso by extending at waist, then hips, gradually extending knees until standing upright. Pull shoulders back slightly if rounded. Repeat.

name: Stiff-leg Deadlift:  Straight-back
description: With back straight, bow forward by bending hips and bend knees slightly during descent. Raise torso by extending hips while gradually extending knees until standing upright. Pull shoulders back slightly if rounded. Repeat.

name: Lunge
description: Lunge forward with first leg. Land on heel then forefoot. Lower body by flexing knee and hip of front leg until knee of rear leg is almost in contact with floor. Return to original standing position by forcibly extending hip and knee of forward leg. Repeat by alternating lunge with opposite leg.

name: Lunge:  Rear Lunge
description: Step back with one leg while bending supporting leg. Plant forefoot far back on floor. Lower body by flexing knee and hip of supporting leg until knee of rear leg is almost in contact with floor. Return to original standing position by extending hip and knee of forward supporting leg and return rear leg next to supporting leg. Repeat movement with opposite legs alternating between sides.

name: Split Squat
description: Squat down by flexing knee and hip of front leg. Allow heel of rear foot to rise up while knee of rear leg bends slightly until it almost makes contact with floor. Return to original standing position by extending hip and knee of forward leg. Repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Squat
description: Squat down by bending hips back while allowing knees to bend forward slightly, keeping back straight and knees pointed same direction as feet.   Descend until thighs are just past parallel to floor. Extend knees and hips until legs are straight. Return and repeat.

name: Squat:  Front Squat
description: Squat down by bending hips back while allowing knees to bend forward slightly, keeping back straight and knees pointed same direction as feet.   Descend until thighs are just past parallel to floor. Extend knees and hips until legs are straight. Return and repeat.

name: Step-up
description: Place foot of first leg on bench. Stand on bench by extending hip and knee of first leg and place foot of second leg on bench. Step down with second leg by flexing hip and knee of first leg. Return to original standing position by placing foot of first leg to floor. Repeat first step with opposite leg, alternating first steps between legs.

name: Step-up:  Step Down
description: Stand on bench by straightening leg and pushing body upward. Step down returning foot off of bench to floor and repeat. Continue with opposite position.

name: Deadlift
description: Lift lever by extending hips and knees to full extension. Pull shoulders back at top of lift if rounded. Return weight by bending hips back while allowing knees to bend forward slightly, keeping back straight and knees pointed same direction as feet. Repeat.

name:
Deadlift:  Stiff-leg Deadlift

Straight-back
description: Bow forward by bending hips. Bend knees slightly during descent and keep waist straight, flexing low back at bottom. With knees slightly bent, raise torso by extending at waist, then hips, gradually extending knees until standing upright. Pull shoulders back slightly if rounded. Repeat.

name: Leg Presses
description: Flex hips and knees to lower lever until hips are completely flexed. Push platform by extending knees and hips. Repeat.

name: Leg Presses:  45° Leg Press
description: Flex hips and knees to lower lever until hips are completely flexed. Push platform by extending knees and hips. Repeat.

name: Leg Presses:  Lying Leg Press
description: Push lever platform away by extending hips and knees until knees are straight. Return lever platform by flexing hips and knees until knees are just short of complete flexion or until hips are completely flexed. Repeat.

name: Leg Presses:  Seated Leg Press
description: Push platform(s) away by extending knees and hips until knees are fully extended. Return until hips are completely flexed. Repeat.

name: Lying Hip Extension
description: Extend hips and knees until legs are straight. Return to original position by flexing hips and knees. Repeat.

name: Reverse Hyper-extension
description: Raise lever by extending hips as high as possible with legs nearly straight. Lower legs to original position. Repeat.

name: Single Leg Split Squat
description: With chest high, lift lever by extending hips and knees to full extension. Return until knee of rear leg is almost in contact with floor. Repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Single Leg Split Squat:  Single Leg Squat
description: Bend knee forward slightly while allowing hips to bend back behind, keeping back straight and knee pointed same direction of foot. Squat down as low as possible. Extend knee and hip until leg is straight. Return and repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Split Squat
description: With chest high, lift lever by extending hips and knees to full extension. Return until knee of rear leg is almost in contact with floor and repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Squat
description: Squat down by bending hips back while allowing knees to bend forward slightly, keeping back straight and knees pointed same direction as feet. name: Squat:  Front Squat

name: Glute-Ham Raise
description: From lower position, raise torso by extending hips until fully extended. Continue to raise body by flexing knees until body is upright. Lower body by straightening knees until body is horizontal. Continue to lower torso by bending hips until body is upside down. Repeat.

name: Good-morning
description: Keeping back straight, bend hips to lower torso forward until parallel to floor. Raise torso until hips are extended. Repeat.

name: Hyperextension
description: Raise upper body until hip and waist are fully extended. Lower body by bending hips and waist until fully flexed. Repeat.

name: Hyperextension (45°)
description: Raise upper body until hip and waist are fully extended. Lower body by bending hips and waist until fully flexed. Repeat.

name: Straight-leg Deadlift
description: With knees straight, lower bar toward top of feet by bending hips. After hips can no longer flex, bend waist as bar approaches top of feet. Lift bar by extending waist and hip until standing upright. Pull shoulders back slightly if rounded. Repeat.

name: Straight-leg Deadlift:  Straight-back
description: With knees and back straight, lower bar by bending hips until hamstrings are tight, or just before lower back bends. Lift bar by extending hips until upright. Pull shoulders slightly back at top of lift if rounded. Repeat.

name: Lying Leg Curl
description: Raise ankles to glutes by flexing knees. Lower ankles until knees are straight. Repeat.

name: Standing Leg Curl
description: Pull cable attachment back by flexing knee until knee is fully flexed. Return by straightening knee to original position and repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Straight-back Straight-leg Deadlift
description: With knees and back straight, bow forward by bending hips until hamstrings are tight, or just before lower back bends. Raise body upright by extending hips until standing. Pull shoulders back slightly at top of lift if rounded. Repeat.

name: Straight-back Straight-leg Deadlift
description: With knees straight, lower dumbbells by bending hips until hamstrings are tight, or just before lower back bends. Lift dumbbells by extending hips until straight. Pull shoulders back slightly at top of lift if rounded. Repeat.

name: Kneeling Leg Curl
description: Raise ankle to back of thigh by flexing knee. Lower ankle until knee is straight. Repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Seated Leg Curl
description: Pull lever to back of thighs by flexing knees. Return lever until knees are straight. Repeat.

name: Straight-back Straight-leg Deadlift
description: With knees and back straight, bow forward by bending hips until hamstrings are tight, or just before lower back bends. Raise body upright by extending hips until standing. Pull shoulders back slightly at top of lift if rounded. Repeat.

name: Bent-over Leg Curl
description: Raise lever up by bending knee as high as possible. Return lever until knee is straight. Repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Kneeling Leg Curl
description: Raise ankle to back of thigh by flexing knee. Lower ankle until knee is straight. Repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Lying Leg Curl
description: Raise lever pad to back of thighs by flexing knees. Lower lever pads until knees are straight. Repeat.

name: Seated Leg Curl
description: Pull far padded lever toward back of thighs by flexing knees. Return lever until knees are straight. Repeat.

name: Standing Leg Curl
description: Pull lever up to back of thigh by flexing knee. Return lever until knee is straight. Repeat. Continue with opposite leg.

name: Good-morning

name: Straight-back Straight-leg Deadlift

name: Glute-Ham Raise
description: From upright position, lower body by straightening knees until body is horizontal. Continue to lower torso by bending hips until body is upside down. Raise torso by extending hips until fully extended. Continue to raise body by flexing knees until body is upright. Repeat.

name: Hyperextension
description: Raise upper body until hips and waist are fully extended. Lower body by bending hips and waist until fully flexed. Repeat.

name: Hyperextension (45°)
description: Raise upper body until hips and waist are fully extended. Lower body by bending hips and waist until fully flexed. Repeat.

name: Hamstring Raise
description: Raise upper body until hips and waist are fully extended. Lower body by bending hips and waist until fully flexed. Repeat.

name: Glute-Ham Raise
description: From upright position, lower body by straightening knees until body is horizontal. Continue to lower torso by bending hips until body is upside down. Raise torso by extending hips until fully extended. Continue to raise body by flexing knees until body is upright. Repeat.

name: Glute-Ham Raise:  hands behind hips
description: From upright position, lower body by straightening knees until body is horizontal. Continue to lower torso by bending hips until body is upside down. Raise torso by extending hips until fully extended. Continue to raise body by flexing knees until body is upright. Repeat.

name: Single Leg Hanging Hamstring Bridge
description: From upright position, lower body by straightening knees until body is horizontal. Continue to lower torso by bending hips until body is upside down. Raise torso by extending hips until fully extended. Continue to raise body by flexing knees until body is upright. Repeat.

name: Single Leg 45° Hyperextension
description: From upright position, lower body by straightening knees until body is horizontal. Continue to lower torso by bending hips until body is upside down. Raise torso by extending hips until fully extended. Continue to raise body by flexing knees until body is upright. Repeat.

name: Straight Hip Leg Curl (on ball)
description: From upright position, lower body by straightening knees until body is horizontal. Continue to lower torso by bending hips until body is upside down. Raise torso by extending hips until fully extended. Continue to raise body by flexing knees until body is upright. Repeat.

name: Inverse Leg Curl
description: Lower body with hips straight by slowly straightening knees. Position hands forward, ready to push body weight back up off of surface. Control descent only with hamstrings as low as possible before catching body by quickly placing hands on elevated platform and rapidly pushing off against platform, just enough to assist hamstrings in raising body upward. Return to upright kneeling position and repeat.

name: Leg Curl
description: Pull heels toward rear end by bending knees and hips simultaneously. Return to original position by straightening knees and hips. Repeat.

name: Hanging Leg Curl
description: Pull heels toward rear end by bending knees and hips simultaneously. Return to original position by straightening knees and hips. Repeat.

name: Straight Hip Leg Curl
description: Bend knees, pulling heels toward rear end while keeping hips and low back straight. Raise up until lower legs are vertical or fully flexed. Lower body to original position by straightening knees, maintaining straight hip position. Repeat.

name: Hip Adduction
description: Move near leg just in front of far leg by abduction hip. Return and repeat. Turn around and continue with opposite leg.

name: Seated Hip Adduction
description: Move legs together until leg levers make contact. Allow legs to seperate far apart until slight stretch and repeat.

name: Seated Hip Adduction

name: Standing Hip Adduction

name: Lying Hip Adduction
description: Raise weighted leg up off floor as high as possible while balanciong bar inside of foot and holding onto nearest side of bar. Return to floor and repeat. Repeat and continue with opposite leg.
